evidence.claim: Used NLP, recommendation systems, applied AI, feature engineering, deployment, Information Retrieval, YOLO, Data Pipelines, Milvus, BentoML, TensorFlow, Vector Search, LlamaIndex, OpenSearch, MLflow, LLMs, Diffusion Models, Prompt Engineering, and TTS.
evidence.source_text: Skills: Information Retrieval... YOLO... Data Pipelines... Milvus... BentoML... TensorFlow... Vector Search... LlamaIndex... OpenSearch... MLflow... LLMs... Diffusion Models... Prompt Engineering... TTS

evidence.claim: Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users.
evidence.source_text: Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users

evidence.claim: Improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14% via recommendation system launch.
evidence.source_text: The launch improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%.

evidence.claim: Led the team that migrated keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval.
evidence.source_text: Recently, I led the team that migrated our keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval.

evidence.claim: Collaborated with PMs to define optimization targets for ranking models.
evidence.source_text: Worked closely with PMs to define the optimization target (click-through vs. dwell time vs. downstream conversion)

evidence.claim: Learned through shipping real systems and observing production load performance.
evidence.source_text: my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Believes most retrieval problems are actually evaluation problems in disguise.
evidence.source_text: I've learned that most retrieval problems are actually evaluation problems in disguise.

evidence.claim: Values cross-functional alignment on business metrics as much as technical modeling.
evidence.source_text: Worked closely with PMs to define the optimization target... that work was as important as the modeling itself.
